title: Site Roadmap
content_html:
Site Roadmap

This roadmap coordinates deliberate work on the tracked public site and catalogue runtime centred on /series/. Public Docs Viewer reader features remain on the Docs Viewer Roadmap.

suggested order feature status depends on outcome
1 Site Review And Cleanup proposed — establish an evidence-backed post-refactor baseline, then restore clear routing, state, CSS, shell, and verification ownership without redesigning the public catalogue

Bug fixes and small maintenance continue normally. Add another feature only when it has a coherent Site outcome distinct from this baseline review and cleanup.
